intro: Achillea millefolium tincture, also known as yarrow tincture, is derived from the leaves and flowers of the yarrow plant and is commonly used to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. This tincture is believed to have antiseptic properties, making it a popular natural remedy for minor cuts and scrapes. When used topically or taken internally, achillea millefolium tincture may also help to ease digestive issues and reduce fever.
